function.name: BoneReconstructionPlanner
function.description: Guided interactive workflow for BoneReconstructionPlanner. Execute steps in order. Interactive steps require user 3D interaction. Steps: 'create_bone_models': Generate 3D surface models from mandible and fibula segmentations using the module's Logic.; 'add_mandibular_curve': Place a markup curve along the ideal mandibular arch to guide initial cut plane positioning. (interactive: curve); 'add_cut_plane': Place a markup plane on the mandible model; adjacent planes define bone pieces for reconstruction. (interactive: plane); 'add_fibula_line': Draw a markup line along the fibula diaphysis (distal to proximal) to define the fibula axis. (interactive: line); 'center_fibula_line': Automatically adjust the fibula line to coincide with the anatomical axis of the fibula model.; 'update_fibula_planes': Compute fibula cut planes from mandible planes and fibula axis, create bone pieces, and transform them to the mandible position.; 'hard_vsp_update': Force a complete recomputation of the virtual surgical plan outputs without modifying input objects.; 'create_reconstruction_3d_model': Generate a combined STL model of the neomandible (mandible plus fibula pieces) for 3D printing.; 'create_dental_implant_fiducials': Place fiducial points on neomandible pieces where dental implant cylinders should be positioned. (optional — ask user first); 'create_dental_implant_cylinders': Generate cylindrical models representing dental implants at the fiducial locations on the neomandible. (optional — ask user first)

user_action.description: Action: 'start' to begin a step, 'proceed' after user completes interaction, 'skip' for optional steps, 'cancel' to abort workflow
